LanguageData.PM_Culture_Sweeper.label: Sweeper
LanguageData.PM_Culture_Sweeper.description: Sweeper bands split into "families" and address each other with familial or cordial terms — brother, uncle, neighbor. These families reflect no blood ties, but a metaphorical affection. Sweepers watch over one another and respect the residents of the Backstreets. But once Night falls in the Backstreets, everything are just another Thing to be cleaned.
